sets.passage: Last Friday our class went to the school library for the first time. We were all very (1)____ because we had never seen so many books before. The library was big and (2)____. sets.explain_zh: (1)第一次见到这么多书，应是兴奋excited，非tired/angry/sad。(2)有上千本书且能阅读，图书馆应明亮bright，非dark/dirty/empty。(3)老师'要求'我们不要大声说话用asked sb not to do，最自然。(4)保持安静以便在安静peace中阅读，noise/trouble/danger不合。(5)在电脑上'查找'书用find。(6)电脑告诉我书在'哪里'where。(7)在书架上'找到'了书found。(8)坐下开始'阅读'read。(9)故事太有趣忘了'时间'time。(10)老师帮我们'办/领取'借书证get a card。(11)有了卡可以'借'书borrow。(12)图书馆会成为我最喜欢的'地方'place。

sets.passage: On Tree Planting Day, our class planted trees on a small hill near the school. It was a sunny (1)____ in spring. The air was fresh and the birds were singing. sets.explain_zh: (1)春天种树，是阳光明媚的'早晨'morning。(2)老师把我们'分成'六组用divided into。(3)铲子和水壶是'工具'tools。(4)Tom和我'一起'工作together。(5)在松软的'土地/地里'ground挖洞。(6)Tom把树扶'直'straight。(7)用干净的水'浇'watered这棵树。(8)树需要水才能'长'grow得高大。(9)努力干活手变'脏'dirty了。(10)累但很'自豪'proud。(11)树会让空气更'清新'fresher。(12)我做了一个'承诺'promise每月来浇水。

sets.passage: Last Monday I learned an important lesson about homework. On Sunday evening, I was watching a fun TV show. My mother (1)____ me, "Have you finished your homework?" sets.explain_zh: (1)妈妈'问'我作业做完没有asked。(2)说了谎，其实不是'真的'true。(3)以为可以早上'早早地'early完成。(4)忘了'作业'homework这件事。(5)闹钟没响，'晚'late醒了。(6)老师'让/叫'大家交作业told sb to do。(7)打开空本子脸变'红'red(尴尬)。(8)老师问我'为什么'why没做why。(9)我告诉她'实话'truth，非lie/joke。(10)永远不要把工作'拖/留'leave到最后一刻。(11)一'回'到家就立刻完成as soon as。(12)这对我是有用的'一课/教训'lesson。

sets.passage: It snowed all night, and when I woke up, the whole world was (1)____. After breakfast, I put on my warm coat and went out for a (2)____. sets.explain_zh: (1)下了一夜雪，整个世界变'白'white了。(2)出门去'散步'walk。(3)雪在'脚'feet下很软。(4)树像穿着白'帽子'hats。(5)冷空气让我感到'清新/清醒'fresh。(6)Mr.Lee在用铲子'清扫'clearing门前的雪。(7)我主动提出'帮助'help他。(8)他'递/给'我一杯热茶offered。(9)孩子们开始'堆'build雪人。(10)雪把小镇变成美丽的'画/图画'picture。(11)尽管天气如此'寒冷'cold。(12)雪天是对别人'友善'kind的好时机。

sets.passage: One afternoon I was walking home from school when I saw a little girl crying near the bus stop. She looked about four years old and was all (1)____. I felt sorry for her, so I decided to (5)____ her. First, I gave her a tissue and told her not to (6)____. Then I asked for her mother's phone (7)____, but she was too young to remember it. So I took her to a (8)____ police officer near the corner. The officer was very (9)____ and kind. He used his radio to ask for help. On my way home, I understood that even a small act of kindness can make a big difference.
sets.explain_zh: (1)小女孩独自一人all alone。(2)问她'什么'事出错了what was wrong。(3)她在市场里走丢了'妈妈'mother(下文母亲来接她，故非bag)。(4)找不到回家的'路'find the way。(5)我决定'帮助'help她。(6)告诉她不要'哭'cry。(7)问她妈妈的电话'号码'number。(8)带她去找'附近的'nearby警察。(9)警察很'耐心'patient又和善。(10)女孩着急的妈妈跑'来'came了。(11)妈妈一次次'感谢'thanked我。(12)我感到非常'高兴'glad。

sets.passage: Last weekend I went to my first cooking class with my mother. We wanted to learn how to make simple (1)____ at home. The teacher, Mrs. Wang, was a friendly woman who loved to cook. sets.explain_zh: (1)学做简单的'饭菜'dishes。(2)摸食物前先洗'手'hands。(3)蛋炒饭'容易'easy做。(4)只要你'细心'careful就不难。(5)用筷子把蛋'搅拌'mixed好。(6)妈妈把葱切成小'块/段'pieces。(7)油'热'hot时倒入鸡蛋。(8)把所有东西'翻炒/搅'stirred在一起。(9)厨房满是美味的'香味'smell。(10)把饭装盘并'品尝'tasted。(11)因为是我'自己'myself做的。(12)我想'经常'often为家人做饭。

sets.passage: Our school held a friendly English-speaking competition last Thursday. Many students from different classes (1)____ part in it. sets.explain_zh: (1)许多学生'参加'take part in。(2)起初有点'紧张'nervous。(3)别'担心'don't worry。(4)轮到我时'轮次/turn'came。(5)讲我'可爱的'lovely狗的故事。(6)努力说得清楚又'自信'confidently。(7)同学给我热烈的'掌声'applause。(8)老师'宣布'announced获奖者。(9)我赢了'第一'first名。(10)Lily跑来'拥抱'hugged我。(11)比赛'教会'taught我勇敢。(12)还交了新'朋友'friends。

sets.explain_zh: (1)给老师准备特别的'礼物'gift。(2)她和善又'耐心'patient。(3)不知该'送给'give老师什么。(4)鲜花太'贵'expensive且易枯。(5)Lucy有个好'主意'idea。(6)我们'自己'ourselves做卡片by ourselves。(7)第二天'带'brought彩纸笔胶水来。(8)每人写几句'友善/暖心'kind的话。(9)谢谢您一直'教'teaching我们。(10)卡片越来越'漂亮'beautiful。(11)她太'感动'moved以致热泪盈眶。(12)我们'手工'handmade的礼物让老师感到被爱。

sets.explain_zh: (1)尽可能多读书as many as we could。(2)每人得一个小'本子'notebook记书名。(3)起初以为读书会'无聊'boring。(4)关于男孩乘气球环游'世界'world。(5)书太好停不下来can not stop doing。(6)在树下'读'read两小时。(7)书单慢慢变'长'longer。(8)我'借'lent给妹妹一些图画书。(9)这是我的新'纪录'record。(10)老师'表扬'praised读得最多的学生。(11)我得到书签作为'奖品'prize。(12)书能带我们去许多奇妙的'地方'places。

sets.passage: One rainy evening, I found a brown wallet on the ground near my home. I picked it (1)____ and looked inside. There was some (2)____, a bank card and a photo of a small boy. So I decided to return the wallet to the right (6)____. I asked my father to go with me. We walked to a tall building not far (7)____ our home. When we knocked on the door, a worried man opened it. "I only did the (11)____ thing," I told him. My father looked at me and smiled (12)____. On the way home, I felt happier than ever. Being honest, I learned, is its own reward.
sets.explain_zh: (1)我把钱包'捡起来'picked it up。(2)里面有一些'钱'money。(3)钱包一定'属于'belong to某人。(4)第一个念头是找'失主'owner。(5)身份证上有名字和'地址'address。(6)把钱包还给正确的'人'person。(7)离我家不'远'not far from。(8)看到失而复得的钱包他很'惊讶'surprised。(9)以为再也'见'see不到它了。(10)他想给我钱作为'酬谢'reward。(11)我只是做了'对'right的事。(12)爸爸'自豪地'proudly笑了。
